_note: This file lists named groups of existing scenario ids (the same names as your .sim.json files without the extension). The UI reads it via GET /api/designs/.../ensembles. It does not replace per-scenario sim+json+csv; it only tells the app which tabs to treat as one ensemble for merged variable lists and (later) multi-scenario playback. The file name must match the design folder leaf: fullblockpkl2/fullblockpkl2.ensemble.json.
